chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 38 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 31.01.2023 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for applicant/accused. M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Bahawal-ud-Din Shaikh, Special Prosecutors NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant Criminal Bail Application, the applicant, namely, Hassan Ali son of Talib Hussain Magsi, seeks pre-arrest bail in Reference No. 18 of 2020 (Re. The State v. Nisar Ahmed Sodher and others), pending trial before learned Accountability Court-I at Sukkur. Since the applicant/accused has directly approached this Court for grant of pre-arrest bail, with consent of learned Counsel for applicant/ accused and learned Special Prosecutor NAB, instant pre-arrest bail application is converted into an application for protective bail. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, applicant/ accused is admitted to protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 31.01.2023 to 06.02.2023 (both days inclusive) on the same surety already furnished on his behalf with direction to execute a fresh P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court, to enable him to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498, Cr.P.C. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within the stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
